ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* Path to the brand's logo image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product line belongs to */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "product_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the size chart belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size chart is applicable to (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart detail */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart detail is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer support) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feedback is related to */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating (1-5, with 5 being the best) */,
  "fit_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the fit rating (1-5, with 5 being the highest) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
